entries.name: plugins
entries.description:
Registered auth plugins. UI packages widen the element type via the
`AuthPluginRegister` module-augmentation slot.

entries.name: additionalFields
entries.description: Additional user fields rendered on sign-up and the user profile.

entries.name: redirectTo
entries.description: Default redirect path after successful authentication

entries.name: avatar
entries.description: Avatar upload, optimization, and deletion configuration.

tags.name: default
tags.text: { enabled: true, resize: resizeAvatar, size: 256, extension: "png" }

entries.type: { delete?: ((url: string) => Promise<void>); enabled?: boolean; extension?: "png" | "jpg" | "webp" | "inherit"; resize?: ((file: File, size?: number, extension?: "png" | "jpg" | "webp" | "inherit") => Promise<File>); size?: number; upload?: ((file: File) => Promise<string>); }

entries.name: basePaths
entries.description: Base paths for different application sections
entries.type: { auth?: string; settings?: string; organization?: string; }

entries.name: emailAndPassword
entries.type: { enabled?: boolean; confirmPassword?: boolean; forgotPassword?: boolean; maxPasswordLength?: number; minPasswordLength?: number; name?: boolean; rememberMe?: boolean; requireEmailVerification?: boolean; }

entries.name: multipleAccountsPerProvider
entries.description:
Allow users to link multiple accounts from the same social provider.
When false, providers already linked to the account are hidden from the available-to-link list.

entries.name: socialProviders
entries.description: List of enabled social authentication providers

entries.name: viewPaths
entries.description: View path mappings for different authentication views
entries.type: { auth?: { signIn?: string; signUp?: string; forgotPassword?: string; resetPassword?: string; signOut?: string; verifyEmail?: string; magicLink?: string; }; settings?: { account?: string; security?: string; organizations?: string; }; }

entries.name: navigate
entries.description: Function to navigate to a new path

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Navigation options with href and optional replace flag

tags.name: default
tags.text: window.location.href = href (or window.location.replace if replace: true)

tags.name: example

entries.name: queryClient
entries.description: TanStack QueryClient to use for your application's queries.
